email_lastcall.subject: [First Name] — [Category] update for [Community Name]
email_lastcall.preview_text: Quick status update from your account manager
email_lastcall.body:
Hi [First Name],

Quick update from [AM Name].

Since your proposal was sent, [X] more [Category] position(s) in [Community Name] have been filled. There are now [Y] remaining.

Your proposal is still active at $300/month.

[ACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP →]

To check current availability in your category:

[VIEW [COMMUNITY NAME] STATUS →]

If this isn't the right time, no need to respond. I'll reach out if anything changes in your category.

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
